summary: Second dispatch attempt (first attempt got a clarifying question back from headless claude -p, no code -- task prompt rewritten with concrete file/module/trait guidance in both .hekton/veilgremlin-dag.toml and the regenerated T03.md, then re-dispatched). Real work: 5 detectors (email/phone/ip/iban_sortcode/entropy, ~800 lines) + criterion bench, matching the prompt. Cargo.lock regenerated + 1 clippy unused-import fixed in worktree (mechanical, not logic). Reviewed by my own pass + two rounds of Codex cross-model doubt-driven-development: 9+5 findings total, 3 real bugs fixed (IPv4-mapped IPv6 partial-match, entropy detector missing password special-characters, a resulting IP/IPv4 overlap), rest documented as accepted trade-offs or refuted against the real task breakdown. Full verify (build/clippy/fmt/test, 41 tests) green in both the worktree and the real repo post-apply. Also surfaced a real, previously-unhit gateway-review.sh bug (RISK-0017, engine-gateway-lab): output_artifact resolution assumes same-repo tasks, breaking on ACT-dispatched cross-repo worktree runs -- worked around with a placeholder, not yet fixed at the root. Approved at tollgate by the human.
